name: Ipmi_CommandPayload_PackedNetFn_NetFn
description: Ipmi_CommandPayload_PackedNetFn_NetFn schema from Censys Platform API

is_request.description: True if the least-significant bit is zero

is_response.description: True if the least-significant bit is one

name.description: The human-readable name of the NetFn

raw.description: The raw value of the NetFn (6 bits, least significant indicates request/response)

value.description: The normalized value of the NetFn (i.e. raw & 0xfe, so it is always even)
